title: diplotaxis catholica subvar. rivulorum
intro: Diplotaxis catholica subvar. rivulorum, also known as Rivulated Wall Rocket, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rivulated Wall Rocket include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Rivulated Wall Rocket plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
